import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("TypeText")
def test_TypeText(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Type 'aaa' into CLViewContainer"):
        actions.type_text_by_locator(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'CLViewContainer', 'aaa')
    assert True
